summary: The diff adds new lessons to backend/main.mo. At least 8 new lessons are visible (IDs 8–15+ from the truncated content), covering Beginner, Intermediate, and Advanced difficulties. Each lesson includes title, description, codeSnippet, and difficulty. However, the build request specifically requires a 'topic emoji' field in each lesson, which does not appear in the Lesson type definition or any lesson records shown in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each new lesson must include a topic emoji field.
missing_requirements.reason: The Lesson type definition in backend/main.mo does not include a topicEmoji (or equivalent) field, and none of the lesson records in the diff contain a topic emoji. The build request explicitly states each lesson must include a 'topic emoji'.
